## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Enter '...'
3. Click '...'
4. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error message or screenshot if relevant.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12.1]
- Running via: [ ] `python run.py`  [ ] Docker  [ ] Other

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant.
